title: Qualcomm CEO says AI agents will replace apps — as chip giant works on 40 new AI-powered devices
summary: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon predicts AI agents will eventually replace traditional apps while the company develops 40 new AI-powered devices. He believes smart glasses could eventually rival smartphones as a dominant platform, positioning Qualcomm to capitalize on this industry shift.
content: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon said he is bullish on smart glasses which could eventually become as big as the smartphone.

zh.title: 高通CEO表示AI代理将取代应用程序——芯片巨头开发40款新AI设备
zh.summary: 高通首席执行官克里斯蒂亚诺·阿蒙预测AI代理最终将取代传统应用程序，同时该公司正在开发40款新型AI设备。他认为智能眼镜最终可能与智能手机相抗衡，成为主导平台，这将使高通能够利用这一行业转变。

title: Australia central bank warns hikes are not off the table as it keeps rates steady at 4.35%
summary: The Reserve Bank of Australia held interest rates steady at 4.35% while signaling future rate hikes remain possible if inflation doesn't decline further. The central bank emphasized that persistent inflation still exceeds its target, keeping the door open for additional monetary tightening.
content: In its statement, the RBA said that inflation was "still too high," which warranted to keep the cash rate unchanged

zh.title: 澳大利亚央行警告加息仍有可能，同时将利率维持在4.35%
zh.summary: 澳大利亚储备银行将利率维持在4.35%的水平，同时表示如果通胀进一步下降，未来加息仍有可能。央行强调持续性通胀仍然超过目标，为进一步的货币紧缩敞开了大门。

title: Bank of Japan hikes rates to 1%, highest since 1995, as yen and inflation worries take hold
summary: The Bank of Japan raised its policy rate to 1%, the highest level since 1995, marking its first rate increase since December as it tackles inflation and currency pressures. This move reflects the BOJ's commitment to normalize monetary policy after years of near-zero rates.
content: This is the BOJ's first hike since December, when it raised rates to its current level of 0.75%, also its highest level in over 30 years.

zh.title: 日本央行将利率上调至1%，为1995年以来最高，因日元和通胀担忧升温
zh.summary: 日本央行将政策利率上调至1%，这是1995年以来的最高水平，标志着自12月以来的首次加息，以应对通胀和汇率压力。这一举措反映了日本央行在多年接近零利率后实现货币政策正常化的承诺。

title: Japan raises interest rate to highest since 1995
summary: The Bank of Japan has raised its interest rates to the highest level since 1995 as part of a gradual tightening cycle that began in 2024. This represents a significant shift in Japan's ultra-loose monetary policy stance.
content: The Bank of Japan has been raising rates from near-zero since 2024.

zh.title: 日本将利率上调至1995年以来最高水平
zh.summary: 日本央行已将利率上调至1995年以来最高水平，这是自2024年开始的逐步收紧周期的一部分。这代表了日本超宽松货币政策立场的重大转变。

title: Biotech IPO window is opening but big pharma M&A still sets the pace, top bankers tell CNBC
summary: While biotech companies have better IPO prospects, major pharmaceutical mergers and acquisitions remain the dominant trend in biopharma dealmaking. Drug makers are consolidating to bolster pipelines before key patents expire later in the decade.
content: Biopharma dealmaking is driven by pressure to top up drug pipelines ahead of major patent expirations later this decade.

zh.title: 生物技术IPO窗口打开，但大制药并购仍主导局面
zh.summary: 虽然生物技术公司的IPO前景更好，但大型制药业的并购仍然是生物制药交易的主导趋势。制药公司正在进行整合，以在关键专利在十年后失效前加强产品管道。

title: Gold sell-off was a 'reset,' says Barclays — and these mining stocks could benefit from a rebound
summary: Barclays characterizes recent gold price declines as a "reset" rather than a fundamental shift, suggesting precious metals could rebound as geopolitical risks persist and interest rate expectations stabilize. Mining stocks may particularly benefit from a gold price recovery.
content: Gold's safe haven status was called into question during the war as the specter of higher interest rates weighed on the non-yielding asset.

zh.title: 黄金抛售是一次"调整"，巴克莱表示，这些矿业股可能从反弹中受益
zh.summary: 巴克莱将最近的黄金价格下跌描述为"调整"而非基本面转变，表明随着地缘政治风险持续和利率预期稳定，贵金属可能反弹。矿业股可能特别受益于黄金价格的恢复。

title: Fed's 2026 rate path is underpriced by markets if this PGIM call is right
summary: PGIM analysts believe markets are underestimating the Federal Reserve's 2026 interest rate trajectory, suggesting the Fed may keep rates higher for longer than current pricing reflects. This discrepancy between market expectations and Fed policy could create significant trading implications.

zh.title: 美联储2026年利率路径被市场低估——如果PGIM的判断正确的话
zh.summary: PGIM分析师认为市场低估了美联储2026年的利率轨迹，表明美联储可能会比当前市场定价所反映的时间更长地维持高利率。市场预期与美联储政策之间的这种差异可能会产生重大交易影响。

title: China economy weakens further in May as retail sales post first drop in over three years
summary: China's economy deteriorated in May with retail sales declining for the first time in over three years and urban investment contracting more than expected. These weak data points signal a deepening economic slowdown in the world's second-largest economy.
content: China's retail sales fell for the first time in more than three years in May, while urban investment contracted more than expected, adding to signs the economic slump deepened.

zh.title: 中国5月经济进一步走弱，零售销售创三年多来首次下滑
zh.summary: 中国5月份经济形势恶化，零售销售创三年多来首次下降，城市投资收缩幅度超出预期。这些疲弱的数据表明全球第二大经济体的经济放缓正在加深。

title: South Korean defense stocks surge on prospects for post-Iran-war sales boosts
summary: South Korean defense stocks are surging on expectations that the Iran conflict will create new sales opportunities in the Middle East. The sector sees potential for expanding export pipelines to regional buyers seeking military equipment.
content: South Korean defense stocks have risen as there will be "numerous export pipelines" for companies to sell to the Middle East.

zh.title: 韩国防务股因伊朗战争后销售机会前景而飙升
zh.summary: 韩国防务股因伊朗冲突预期会在中东创造新销售机会而飙升。该行业看好向寻求军事装备的地区买家扩展出口管道的前景。

title: The biggest risk to your retirement isn’t a market crash — it’s a crisis you probably haven’t planned for
summary: Health-related financial risks pose the greatest threat to retirement security, often outweighing market volatility concerns. Adequate planning for medical and long-term care expenses is critical for maintaining financial stability in retirement.
content: Health-related financial risks are the No. 1 threat to retirement security.

zh.title: 退休最大的风险不是市场崩盘——而是你可能还没有做好准备的危机
zh.summary: 与健康相关的财务风险对退休保障构成最大威胁，往往超过市场波动的关注。充分规划医疗和长期护理费用对于维持退休财务稳定至关重要。

title: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
summary: Helium-3, an expensive and increasingly rare isotope, is in high demand for various applications. Companies and governments are exploring lunar mining as a potential source to meet projected demand surges.
content: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.

zh.title: 什么是氦-3，我们能从月球获得它吗？
zh.summary: 氦-3是一种昂贵且日益稀有的同位素，在各种应用中需求量很大。各公司和政府正在探索月球采矿作为潜在来源，以满足预计的需求增长。

title: Thames Water moves step closer to nationalisation after government objects to rescue deal
summary: Thames Water, the UK's major water utility, faces potential nationalization after the government rejected a private rescue plan as inadequate for consumer and environmental protection. The rejection signals the government may take direct control to address service and environmental concerns.
content: A government spokesman tells the BBC that the current offer "does not do enough to protect consumers or the environment".

zh.title: 英国政府反对救援方案后，泰晤士水务公司更接近国有化
zh.summary: 英国主要水务公司泰晤士水务在政府拒绝私人救援计划（认为其不足以保护消费者和环保）后，面临潜在的国有化。这一拒绝表明政府可能会直接控制该公司以解决服务和环保问题。
